name: @acwilan/openclaw-draw-things-plugin
description: OpenClaw tool for Draw Things CLI - local AI image generation on Apple Silicon

scripts.version:patch: npm version patch && npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json && git commit -m "chore(release): update changelog and bump version"
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor && npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json && git commit -m "chore(release): update changelog and bump version"
scripts.version:major: npm version major && npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json && git commit -m "chore(release): update changelog and bump version"
scripts.publish:clawhub: clawhub package publish "$(pwd)" --family code-plugin --source-repo acwilan/openclaw-draw-things --source-commit $(git rev-parse HEAD) --name @acwilan/draw-things --version $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")

author: Andres
